mapper.sql:
select re.role_name , ui.password , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username
FROM user_info ui left join role_enum re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id
mapper.select:
select re.role_name , ui.password , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id , ui.username
FROM user_info ui left join
role_enum
re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
